dict.string: PRE uses your approximate location to understand context (home, work, commuting) — no GPS coordinates are stored.
PRE uses your approximate location to understand context (home, work, commuting) — no GPS coordinates are stored.
PRE reads your calendar events to track time allocation and detect scheduling patterns.
PRE checks what music is playing to understand your listening patterns.
PRE reads browser history and message metadata to build your personal model. No content is ever read — only metadata.
